_note: Throwaway probe fixtures for the master evaluator-reliability kill-test. 24 lopi-style cases. ground_truth is assigned BEFORE any judge runs (see 00-preregistration.md). bucket = machine_checkable | judgment. adversarial=true marks the gamed/cherry-picked/tautology cases lopi exists to stop.
